payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new claim conflicts directly with existing relationship information about Sara and lacks disambiguating context; it may refer to a different Sara or be an error.

details: Identified a direct conflict between existing and new kinship relations.
Chose not to commit new durable memory.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided presenting either conflicting claim as updated current truth.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
Ask which relationship is correct now.
If both are true in different contexts, create separate entities with disambiguating details.
